evals.prompt: Verify a Lore change that adds freshness fields to search results exposed through CLI and MCP.
evals.expected_output: Selects retrieval tests, CLI/MCP parity tests, bounded/null-field checks, privacy fixture review, and npm run check.

assertions.text: Includes CLI/MCP parity testing when both surfaces expose the operation.
Checks bounded output and null for unknown fields.
Keeps npm run check as the final gate.

evals.prompt: Verify a Lore workflow skill-only change to lore-brief.
evals.expected_output: Runs bundle-shape and test-report validators, executes the skill eval/review pass, records evidence, and runs npm run check.

assertions.text: Runs the workflow skill bundle validator.
Requires concrete eval evidence in evals/test-report.md.

evals.prompt: Verify a change touching Lore forget/exclude destructive memory behavior.
evals.expected_output: Selects forget/exclude/tombstone tests, confirms no destructive MCP exposure, checks explicit confirmation and privacy fixtures, then runs npm run check.

assertions.text: Confirms destructive memory operations remain CLI-only.
Rejects real transcript or credential fixtures.
